creator: wblock@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 173309
textproc/igor patch

Update igor.  Modifications:

Improved DocBook <para> test.
Many more known mispellings, now a total of 3100.
New style check for plurals formed with (s). 
XML checkstyle output bug fix from Joseph Mingrone.
Improvements to DocBook straggling tag detection.
